patch.value: Implements issue-report remediation for false-negative health status caused by missing optional directories (events/reminders/milestones/meetings).
Health optional directory strictness and compatibility
Adjust pm health directory checks so optional unused item-type folders do not force global failure by default, with additive strict mode support.
pm health treats optional item-type directories as non-fatal by default while supporting explicit strict directory enforcement and deterministic diagnostics.
Health status reflects real integrity state
Optional directory gaps no longer fail default health
Reported behavior currently marks healthy trackers as failed

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm search health missing directory strict-directories optional directories --limit 10; pm list-open --limit 20; no active item currently tracks optional-directory strictness semantics for pm health.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Implement with additive strict flag and preserve existing compatibility for users who want strict enforcement.

author: codex-agent
message: Claim item for external issue report implementation
